description: It is 5:00 PM and you are Alice Johnson, a lead developer. Perform your daily status update for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project. Log in as 'alice.johnson' (Password: 'User1234!@') and update the work package 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' with a status of 'In progress', 20% progress, and 4 hours of 'Development' time. Include the comment: 'Initial indexing structure created. Mapping configuration is pending review.'
